settings.headline: Genuinely thicker hair after 12 weeks
settings.body: I'd given up. Started seeing baby hairs at week 6, real density by week 10. My hairdresser noticed before I told her. Worth every penny.
settings.name: Sarah M.

settings.headline: Salon-quality skin from my sofa
settings.body: I was spending £80 a month on facials. The face mask paid for itself in the first month and my skin actually looks better than after treatments.
settings.name: Claire B.

settings.headline: Sleeping through the night for the first time in years
settings.body: 15 minutes before bed and I'm out. The warmth alone is calming, but something about it actually shifts my whole nervous system.
settings.name: James T.

settings.headline: The bundle is the move
settings.body: Bought all three after my friend wouldn't shut up about hers. Six weeks in: hair fuller, skin glowing, sleeping better. No regrets.
settings.name: Rachel T.

settings.headline: Skeptical husband, now uses it every day
settings.body: Bought the cap for him as a joke gift. Three months later he's the one reminding me to charge it. His hairline is genuinely filling in.
settings.name: Emma R.

settings.headline: Finally something that works
settings.body: I've tried every retinol, every serum, every viral tiktok product. This is the only thing that's made a visible difference to my fine lines. Eight weeks in.
settings.name: Priya S.

settings.headline: Worth it for the migraines alone
settings.body: I bought it for sleep but I've noticed my tension headaches are basically gone. The heat is so gentle, way better than a wheat bag.
settings.name: David L.

settings.headline: Better than the £400 clinic version
settings.body: I was about to book a course of red light at my dermatologist (£1,200 total). Tried the mask first. Saw the same results in month 2. Cancelled the booking.
settings.name: Sophie A.

settings.headline: Easy to actually use, that's the win
settings.body: I have a million skincare gadgets I never use. This one I actually do because it's literally just a cap. Wear while making coffee, done.
settings.name: Mark P.

settings.headline: Takes longer than I thought
settings.body: Don't expect overnight results. I was about to give up at week 4 but stuck with it. By week 10 the difference was undeniable. Patience pays off but the company should manage expectations better.
settings.name: Hannah K.

settings.headline: My only regret is not buying the bundle
settings.body: Bought the face mask, loved it, ordered the cap a month later, ordered the eye mask a month after that. Should have just bought the bundle and saved myself £40.
settings.name: Olivia W.

settings.headline: 60-day guarantee made me try it
settings.body: Wouldn't have risked £125 without the guarantee. Used it daily for 8 weeks, never even thought about returning. Skin is the best it's been in 10 years.
settings.name: Yasmin H.

settings.headline: Visible difference at 8 weeks
settings.body: Crown was thinning, started using daily after washing hair. By week 8 I could see new growth in the parting. Wife noticed before I told her.
settings.name: Tom W.

settings.headline: Skin texture transformation
settings.body: My pores look smaller, my skin reflects light differently. I genuinely look like I'm wearing makeup when I'm not.
settings.name: Aisha M.

settings.headline: Better than my £200 LED clinic device
settings.body: Sold my old device after a month with this. Same wavelengths, half the price, easier to use.
settings.name: Charlotte F.

settings.headline: Sleep score up 40 points
settings.body: I track my sleep on Whoop. Average recovery score went from 52 to 79 in 6 weeks of using this every night.
settings.name: Adam J.

settings.headline: Best Christmas gift I've given
settings.body: Bought the bundle for my mum. She's 62 and was sceptical. Now she's converted half the WhatsApp group.
settings.name: Megan H.

settings.headline: Charge lasts a bit shorter than advertised
settings.body: Brilliant device, results are real, but I'm getting maybe 10 days per charge not the 14 they say. Still recommending it.
settings.name: Ravi K.

settings.headline: Genuinely better than Botox for me
settings.body: I'd been getting Botox for 4 years. Switched to this for 6 months to see what happened. My skin looks better and I've saved £1,800.
settings.name: Helena B.

settings.headline: Cap is the only thing that's worked
settings.body: Tried Minoxidil for 2 years, finasteride for 1, dermarolling for 6 months. This is the only thing that's actually given me back hair.
settings.name: Connor S.

settings.headline: Anxiety relief I wasn't expecting
settings.body: Bought it for sleep but the heat and the light together has become my evening anxiety reset. Don't know how it works but it does.
settings.name: Beth A.

settings.headline: Pregnancy-safe and effective
settings.body: My midwife confirmed it's safe to use during pregnancy (just not on the bump). Saved my postnatal hair before it even fell out this time.
settings.name: Zara M.

settings.headline: Worth it just for the eye mask
settings.body: The cap and face mask are great but honestly the eye mask alone is worth the bundle price. I sleep like I did when I was 19.
settings.name: Patrick D.

settings.headline: Acne scars fading after years
settings.body: I have post-acne scarring from my teens. Three months of nightly mask use and they're noticeably lighter. First time anything has worked.
settings.name: Theo C.

settings.headline: Subtle but consistent results
settings.body: Don't expect miracles in a week. By month 3 the changes are undeniable. Patience pays off massively with this.
settings.name: Vicki L.

settings.headline: 60-day guarantee is the truth
settings.body: Was about to return it at week 4 because nothing was happening. Stuck with it. By week 9 I was telling everyone about it. Keep going.
settings.name: Naomi W.

settings.headline: Haven't worn concealer in weeks
settings.body: My undereye circles were the bane of my life. Two months of nightly eye mask use and they're 70% gone. Don't even bother with concealer most days.
settings.name: Yasmine T.

settings.headline: Works but the strap is uncomfortable
settings.body: Results are real, no question. But the head strap on the cap digs into my forehead after 20 mins. Wish they'd improve the comfort.
settings.name: Jordan E.

settings.headline: Best skincare investment I've ever made
settings.body: Spent over £2k on skincare last year. Single best thing I bought was this £55 mask. I'm done with overpriced creams.
settings.name: Maya R.

settings.headline: Bundle pays for itself
settings.body: Maths checks out — the bundle saves you basically the price of the eye mask. No-brainer if you want all three.
settings.name: Ben K.

settings.cta_heading: Want to share your Lumisca story?
settings.cta_body: Email us at hello@lumisca.co.uk and we'll send you 20% off your next order in exchange.
